timelines.notes: Fetched 2026-04-22; encyclopedic summary with dated events. Used as secondary reference per Section 1.1; each date cross-checked with Al Jazeera live coverage at aljazeera.com/tag/turkey-syria-earthquake.
Anchor article supplemented by the Al Jazeera Turkey-Syria earthquake liveblog series (same tag), which ran daily dated entries through February 2023.
